desc.title: Ultra-reliable, immutable Linux operating system
desc.p: SUSE Linux Enterprise Micro is a lightweight and secure operating system for the edge. It merges the enterprise-hardened components of SUSE Linux Enterprise with the features that developers want in a modern, immutable operating system. As a result, you get a reliable infrastructure platform with best-in-class compliance that is also simple to use.

Its flexible subscription model makes SUSE Linux Enterprise Micro well-suited for any edge, embedded, or Internet of Things deployment and does not create vendor lock-in. Using SUSE Linux Enterprise Micro, you can build and scale edge systems across a wide range of industries including aerospace, telecom, automotive, defense, healthcare, and manufacturing.
